21:08 â March 19, 2021
Deposit Processing Part Update
We updated the Deposit Processing Part to reflect that Social Development no longer references the ID Schedule for non-members in the BC Benefits Cheques Indemnity Agreement. Instead, you can refer to the
Identification Requirements
provided by the Government of British Columbia.
Non-members who do not have acceptable identification must visit a Ministry of Social Development location and ask them to send acceptable identification to the non-memberâs preferred financial institution.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
Deposit Processing Part
Section 5.6, BC Employment and Assistance Cheques
We provided a link to the Government of British Columbiaâs Identification Requirements. We also clarified that it is the non-memberâs responsibility to go to a Ministry of Social Development location and ask for an acceptable form of identification, if applicable. The non-member can choose a preferred financial institution the Ministry can send the identification to.
